smoke.detail: Box smoke on FTO-43 fixture: run.py cloned the pinned upstream repo (code + 216MB weights) into the gitignored vendor/CardioTox, loaded the TF 2.3.1 meta-ensemble on CPU, and returned P_block=0.0702 (finite, in [0,1]) positionally aligned to the single input. Morgan (r2,1024) on-bit count=7 <= 93 so ad_in_domain=true. pytest tests/test_model_cardiotox_net.py -m model: 1 passed (validates against core.schemas.OutputRecord). Lock box-solved on Rosenbluth (linux-64, protobuf pinned 3.19.6 for TF 2.3.1).

note: CardioTox net hERG P_block adapter: legacy TF 2.3.1 CPU env, bare-array positional alignment, Morgan-onbit<=93 applicability flag in reserved AD fields; weights fetched at first use, not committed.
